pitch.title: Find your workspace
pitch.body: Each company has their own branded workspace at {{workspaceUrlPattern}}. Enter your company slug or work email and we'll route you there.

features.designerBody: Wire reusable process blocks into a graph, no code.
features.isolatedBody: Your data, your roles, your policy rules — never shared.
features.workBody: Bind work to a workflow at creation, track every step.
features.aiBody: Generate workflow drafts from a process description.

form.heading: Continue to your workspace
form.subheading: We'll route you to your tenant's sign-in page.
form.subheadingMobile: Enter your slug or work email to continue.

error.unknown: We couldn't find a workspace for that slug or email domain.
error.generic: Something went wrong while looking up your workspace. Please try again.

selfHosted.modalBody: Running Eduba on your own domain? Enter your instance's URL and we'll take you there.
selfHosted.invalid: Enter a valid URL, for example https://erp.acme.internal
